sub_topics: Identifying central ideas, themes, and supporting details
Understanding word meaning and vocabulary in context
Drawing inferences and evaluating evidence
Analysing arguments and author's perspective
Integrating text with visual data (charts, graphs, and tables)
Evidence-based questions requiring specific proof from passages
Interpreting data from charts or tables tied to passages
Function of words or phrases in context
Literature passages: prose from U.S. and world literature — themes, character analysis, narrative structure
History/Social Studies passages: U.S. founding documents, speeches, economics, sociology, political science
Science passages: biology, chemistry, physics, earth sciences — often include tables, graphs, or charts
Humanities passages: arts, culture, philosophy
Verb tense consistency and usage
Pronoun-antecedent agreement
Subject-verb agreement
Modifier placement and dangling modifiers
Adjective vs. adverb usage
Commonly confused words (their/there/they're, affect/effect, etc.)
Parallel structure in lists and comparisons
Comma usage (lists, introductory clauses, appositives, compound sentences)
Semicolons and their correct usage
Colons to introduce lists and explanations
Apostrophes for possession and contractions
Dashes for emphasis and parenthetical information
End punctuation (periods, question marks, exclamation marks)
Quotation marks and their conventions
Parallelism in sentences and lists
Subordination and coordination
Correcting run-on sentences and comma splices
Correcting sentence fragments
Combining and restructuring sentences for clarity
Transitions between clauses and sentences
Identifying and correcting awkward or redundant phrasing
Logical organization and ordering of information within paragraphs
Logical transitions between sentences and paragraphs
Improving style, tone, and word choice
Adding, removing, or replacing content for clarity and relevance
Selecting words or phrases that best support the author's purpose
Conciseness — eliminating unnecessary words
Passage-level editing for coherence and flow
